description: CompositionRust red coloured ethnic print kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, panel stitch on the chest, panel stitch on the cuffs and hem and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis ethnic kurta by vishudh  is designed to accentuate your femininity with its earthy print and classic cuts. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and flats for a casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
